fabric_include.description: If non-empty, ONLY these NDFC fabric names are converted (underlay + overlay).

switch_naming.description: Device-name source for fabric switches: 'name' (logicalName), 'name_ip', 'ip', or 'serial'.

include_external_neighbors.description: Underlay: draw switches reached only via 'lan_neighbor_link' (ISN/edge/core, not in the fabric inventory) as gray external waypoints.

vlan_base.description: Overlay: first synthetic VLAN id used for a Network that has no vlanId in its template config.

include_endpoints.description: Overlay: draw real hosts from Endpoint Locator beneath their Network (host side = L3 IP, network side = BD VLAN). No-op when the export carries no endpoints (EPL disabled).

max_endpoints_per_network.description: Overlay: cap on real endpoints drawn per Network; excess are noted in the report. Lower for very large fabrics.

emit_intra_vrf_flows.description: Flow list: emit implied any-to-any reachability between Networks that share a VRF (VXLAN EVPN is open within a VRF; off by default to avoid an O(n^2) explosion).

color_overrides.description: Map of NS device name -> [R,G,B] to override the role-based colour (reserved).
